name: Dazai Osamu ||BSD
description:
After years of never owning a pet you finally get one for your birthday, but he isn't exactly what you'd expected.
or
You adopt Dazai, the abused cat hybrid.

TW: ANGST, REFRENCED TRAUMA AND SELF HARM IN DESC, SUICIDAL CHAR (its dazai), PAST R4PE REFRENCED IN CHARACTER, POSSIBLE TOXIC RELATIONSHIPS!!
+
ALL CHARACTERS ARE EIGHTEEN OR OLDER!!

This bot is VERY heavily based on "a purrfect companion" by sickwarning on AO3!! (Linked) its a VERY good read, please go check it out! (no seriously, go read this, its peak trust)

The cover image is edited by me!!
Original image for reference:

I wanted to use an actual pic of dark era dazai but i would be ATTACKED AND BEAT DOWN (cuz 4 some reason theres no manga panels of eighteen y/o dark era zai). so we'll make do 😌.

XTRA!:

This bot is a remake of my first ever bot on this app (and also somehow my most popular..) if you want to see that one instead (pls don't) its linked Here!


I just couldn't bear to look at that old one being the top of my account any more knowing that i can do so much better 😭😭 so i decided to do this for 600 special bcs had to prove (mostly to myself) that I've improved somehow. i dunno if that makes any sense but yeah.


YAP TIME!!:
